name: fetch
description: Perform an HTTP fetch request.

name: sleep
description: Pause execution for a duration.

name: mock_async
description: Yield for testing, resumes with provided value.

name: log
description: Log a message to the browser console.

name: parse
description: Parse a URL string into components.

returns.description: Parsed URL components: scheme, host, port, path, query, fragment

name: encode
description: Encode an object into a query string.

name: query
description: Query Chrome tabs matching given criteria.

params.name: query_info
params.description: Query filter: active, currentWindow, url, etc.

name: create
description: Create a new tab.

name: activate
description: Activate (focus) a tab.

name: close
description: Close a tab.

name: execute_script
description: Execute JavaScript in a target tab.

name: click
description: Click an element by refId in the target tab.

name: fill
description: Fill an input element by refId in the target tab.

name: snapshot
description: Take a DOM snapshot of the target tab and return readable text. Defaults to active tab.

params.name: tab_id
params.description: Target tab ID (defaults to active tab)

name: snapshot_text
description: Take a DOM snapshot and return readable text (explicit alias). Defaults to active tab.

params.name: tab_id
params.description: Target tab ID (defaults to active tab)

name: snapshot_data
description: Take a DOM snapshot and return structured data. Defaults to active tab.

params.name: tab_id
params.description: Target tab ID (defaults to active tab)

returns.description: Structured snapshot with nodes, url, title, viewport

name: scroll_to
description: Scroll to an element by refId in the target tab.

name: evaluate
description: Evaluate JavaScript in a target tab and return the result.

name: back
description: Navigate back in a target tab.

name: wait_for_load
description: Wait for a tab to finish loading.

name: type
description: Type text into an input element by refId in the target tab (appends).

name: press
description: Dispatch a keyboard key press in the target tab.

name: select
description: Select an option in a dropdown by refId in the target tab.

name: check
description: Toggle a checkbox by refId in the target tab.

name: hover
description: Hover over an element by refId in the target tab.

name: unhover
description: Unhover (mouseleave) an element by refId in the target tab.

name: scroll
description: Scroll the target tab page.

params.name: direction
params.description: Scroll direction: up or down (default down)

name: dblclick
description: Double-click an element by refId in the target tab.

name: fetch
description: Perform an HTTP fetch inside a target tab origin.

name: get
description: Get a value from web storage.

name: set
description: Set a value in web storage.

name: delete
description: Remove a key from web storage.

name: list
description: List all keys in web storage.

name: get
description: Get a cookie by name and URL.

returns.description: Cookie object or null if not found

name: set
description: Set a cookie.

params.name: details
params.description: Cookie to set: name, value, url, etc.

name: delete
description: Delete a cookie.

name: list
description: List cookies matching a filter.

name: search
description: Search browser history.

params.name: query
params.description: Search query: text, startTime, endTime, maxResults

name: delete
description: Delete a URL from browser history.

name: search
description: Search bookmarks.

name: create
description: Create a bookmark or folder.

name: delete
description: Delete a bookmark.

name: create
description: Create a browser notification.

params.name: options
params.description: Notification options: type, title, message, iconUrl

name: clear
description: Clear a browser notification.

name: read
description: Read text from the system clipboard.

name: write
description: Write text to the system clipboard.

name: exists
description: Check whether a path exists in the virtual filesystem.

name: stat
description: Get metadata for a path.

returns.description: Metadata object or null if not found

name: list
description: List entries in a directory.

name: mkdir
description: Create a directory (and parents if needed).

name: delete
description: Delete a file or directory (recursive for directories).

name: copy
description: Copy a file from one path to another.

name: move
description: Move (rename) a file from one path to another.

name: read
description: Read raw bytes from a file. Returns base64-encoded string over the async wire.

name: read_text
description: Read a file as UTF-8 text.

name: read_base64
description: Read a file and return its contents as base64.

name: read_range
description: Read a byte range from a file.

name: write
description: Write raw bytes to a file (overwrites existing). Data is base64-encoded over the wire.

name: write_text
description: Write UTF-8 text to a file (overwrites existing).

name: write_base64
description: Write base64-decoded bytes to a file (overwrites existing).

name: append
description: Append raw bytes to a file. Data is base64-encoded over the wire.

name: append_text
description: Append UTF-8 text to a file.

name: append_base64
description: Append base64-decoded bytes to a file.

name: update
description: Write raw bytes at a specific offset in a file. Data is base64-encoded over the wire.

name: hash
description: Compute a hash of a file's contents.

name: readFile
description: Node.js compatible readFile.

name: readFileSync
description: Node.js compatible readFileSync.

name: writeFile
description: Node.js compatible writeFile.

name: writeFileSync
description: Node.js compatible writeFileSync.

name: appendFile
description: Node.js compatible appendFile.

name: appendFileSync
description: Node.js compatible appendFileSync.

name: existsSync
description: Node.js compatible existsSync.

name: readdirSync
description: Node.js compatible readdirSync.

name: mkdirSync
description: Node.js compatible mkdirSync.

name: unlinkSync
description: Node.js compatible unlinkSync.

name: rmdirSync
description: Node.js compatible rmdirSync.

name: copyFileSync
description: Node.js compatible copyFileSync.

name: renameSync
description: Node.js compatible renameSync.

name: statSync
description: Node.js compatible statSync.

name: promises
description: Node.js promises-compatible object.

name: fetch
description: Global fetch — alias for web.fetch.

name: setTimeout
description: Schedule a function to run after a delay.

description: Schedule a function to run repeatedly.

name: clearInterval
description: Cancel a scheduled interval.

name: URL
description: URL class — parses a URL string into components.

returns.description: URL object with href, protocol, host, pathname, search, hash

name: URLSearchParams
description: URLSearchParams — manage query string parameters.

params.description: Query string or object of key-value pairs

returns.description: URLSearchParams instance with append, get, set, delete, toString

name: localStorage
description: localStorage — wraps web.storage for LLM familiarity.

returns.description: Storage object with getItem, setItem, removeItem, clear, key, length

name: sessionStorage
description: sessionStorage — alias for localStorage (same backend).

returns.description: Storage object with getItem, setItem, removeItem, clear, key, length

name: document
description: document — minimal stub with querySelector, querySelectorAll, title, URL.

name: window
description: window — minimal stub with location, document, fetch, localStorage, navigator, setTimeout.

name: navigator
description: navigator — minimal stub with clipboard.

description: Send a message to the extension background script or another extension.

description: Query Chrome tabs matching given criteria.
